SUPPORT SERVICES FOR THE FAMILY WELFARE STRATEGY GROUP

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: CHILD WELFARE SYSTEM REFORM AND PREVENTION - INCREASE COMMUNITY-BASED PROGRAMS AND SERVICES THAT ADDRESS FAMILY NEEDS EARLY ON, ENSURE CHILDREN'S SAFETY AND AVOID ENTRY INTO THE CHILD WELFARE SYSTEM. ASSIST CHILD WELFARE AGENCIES WITH EMPLOYING PRACTICES THAT WILL KEEP FAMILIES TOGETHER, PLACE MORE CHILDREN WITH RELATIVES AND END THE USE OF GROUP HOMES FOR KIDS AND TEENS.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: STRATEGIC COMMUNICATIONS - SUPPORT THE DEVELOPMENT OF EFFECTIVE MESSAGES AND MEDIA PLATFORMS THAT BUILD UNDERSTANDING, SHARE LESSONS, ALIGN ALLIES, MOVE POTENTIAL PARTNERS AND CONVERT CRITICS TO ENSURE ALL CHILDREN AND YOUTH IN AMERICA CAN REACH THEIR FULL POTENTIAL.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: JUVENILE JUSTICE SYSTEM REFORM - PROMOTE POLICIES, PRACTICES AND PROGRAMS THAT SEEK TO PREVENT YOUNG PEOPLE FROM ENTERING THE JUVENILE JUSTICE SYSTEM OR EXPERIENCING UNNECESSARY INCARCERATION AND OTHER FORMS OF OUT-OF-HOME PLACEMENT. THE GOAL IS TO ENSURE YOUTH LIVE IN STABLE, SUPPORTIVE FAMILIES AND CAN SUCCESSFULLY TRANSITION TO ADULTHOOD.
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description4Txt: RESEARCH, EVALUATION AND DATA - EFFORTS TO ENSURE OUR WORK IS DATA-DRIVEN AND EVIDENCE-BASED. THIS SUPPORTS THE DEVELOPMENT OF THE MOST CREDIBLE RESEARCH AND PROGRAM EVALUATIONS TO INFORM THE DESIGN AND MANAGEMENT OF OUR ACTIVITIES AND INVESTMENTS; ACCESS TO REAL-TIME DATA; AND THE CAPACITY TO USE EXISTING DATA RESOURCES.

SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: BSD CAPITAL, INC. DBA LENDISTRY - THE FOUNDATION FUNDED A LOAN TO LENDISTRY, A NONPROFIT COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT FINANCIAL INSTITUTION. LENDISTRY PROVIDES GROWTH CAPITAL TO SMALL BUSINESSES OWNED BY LOW-INCOME MINORITY AND OTHER DISADVANTAGED ENTREPRENEURS WHO DISPROPORTIONALTELY HAVE DIFFICULTY SECURING CAPITAL FROM TRADITIONAL SOURCES.
SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description2Txt: REDF IMPACT INVESTING FUND - THE FOUNDATION FUNDED A COMMITMENT TO REDF IMPACT INVESTING FUND (REDF) TO PROVIDE LOAN CAPITAL AND TECHINICAL ASSISTANCE TO NONPROFIT AND FOR-PROFIT SOCIAL ENTERPRISES AND TO SUPPORT ITS BORROWERS TO IMPROVE THEIR FINANCIAL SUSTAINABILITY SO THEY CAN EMPLOY MORE INDIVIDUALS WITH EMPLOYMENT BARRIERS.
